description: Add an E2E test that verifies the side panel UI updates to show 'Auto' after the user toggles 'Always allow this tool' in the confirmation dialog and clicks Allow. The existing E2E test (permissions.e2e.ts line 321) verifies the server-side behavior (subsequent tool call skips dialog) but does not verify the side panel Select control reflects the permission change. This test covers the bug where runAskFlow was missing a plugins.changed notification to the extension.

userStories.title: E2E test: side panel reflects 'Auto' after Always Allow in confirmation dialog
userStories.description: Add a new E2E test in e2e/permissions.e2e.ts that verifies the side panel permission Select updates to 'Auto' after the user toggles 'Always allow this tool' and clicks Allow in the confirmation dialog. This covers the plugins.changed notification path from runAskFlow.
acceptanceCriteria: New test in permissions.e2e.ts under 'Confirmation dialog — Always Allow' describe block
Test sets browser permission to 'ask', opens side panel, calls a browser tool, toggles Always Allow and clicks Allow
Test verifies the side panel permission Select for the tool shows 'Auto' after the Always Allow flow
Test also verifies config.json has the per-tool override persisted as 'auto'
